story.title: 我们的爱情故事
story.part1: It all began on a rainy afternoon in a small coffee shop in the heart of the city. Dinah was waiting for a friend who never showed up, and Tze Ren happened to be at the next table, pretending to read a book he'd already finished.
story.part2: A spilled latte, a shared umbrella, and countless conversations later, we knew we had found something special. What started as a chance encounter blossomed into a love story we're excited to celebrate with you.
story.quote: "Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite."
